result.markdown: --- format: html title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff" listing: - id: workshops-listing type: table contents: workshops fields: [ID, module, title , file-modified] sort: - ID date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD" sort-ui: false filter-ui: [Module, Number, title] --- # ESQlabs R Trainings This website hosts all the quarto-based presentations and training courses on Open System Pharmacology related R packages. The source files for the material are hosted on [GitHub](https://github.com/esqLABS/r-packages-training). ::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"} ## 🇭🇷 PAGE 2026 — Pre-conference Workshop · 1 June 2026 · Dubrovnik **R Workflows for advanced PB-QSP Modeling with `{ospsuite}` and `{esqlabsR}`** Full-day instructor-led workshop. See the [agenda + day-of deck](agendas/PAGE_2026.qmd), the [cheatsheet](agendas/PAGE_2026_cheatsheet.qmd), and [pre-workshop instructions](agendas/PAGE_2026_pre-workshop-email.md). ::: # 📊 Workshops ::: {#workshops-listing} ::: # 📦 Environment Slides on this site were rendered with the following versions: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} | |Component |Version | |:--------------------------------|:------------------------------------|:-----------| | |R (Because it was There) |4.6.0 | |ospsuite |`{ospsuite}` |12.4.2.9024 | |ospsuite.parameteridentification |`{ospsuite.parameteridentification}` |2.1.1.9013 | |esqlabsR |`{esqlabsR}` |5.6.0.9008 | ::: :::
